title: CVE-2021-25526 — CVSS 4.0 (MEDIUM)

# CVE-2021-25526

CVSS Score: 4.0 (MEDIUM)
Published: 2021-12-08T15:15:08.893
CWEs: CWE-926, NVD-CWE-Other

Intent redirection vulnerability in Samsung Blockchain Wallet prior to version 1.3.02.8 allows attacker to execute privileged action.

References: https://security.samsungmobile.com/serviceWeb.smsb?year=2021&month=12, https://security.samsungmobile.com/serviceWeb.smsb?year=2021&month=12
